MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: B. Paredes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Uravi LLC is present. Represented by Vik Devdhara.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Melthon Branch is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Sep-09-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
